channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender Mustang Bass 1966 4 String Electric Bass Vintage Original 1966 — $4,632.21
item.description:
$4,632.21 · Good · Hyp's Gear Locker

Original 1966 Fender Mustang bass.


– Excellent condition

– Original finish in very good condition, with minor wear and cracking

– Dakota Red

– Oval tuners

– Original pickguard in very good condition

– Original bridge

– Original pickup

– Finish slightly worn on the back of the neck

– Minor nick near the nut

– 3.544 kg (7 lbs)

– With its original silver tolex hard case.


*All original except for the two potentiometers.


The headstock decal indicates that this is one of the first produced by Fender. A true collector's item.

item.title: Fodera Monarch 4 Standard — $6.54
item.description:
$6.54 · Excellent · rolf's Gear Locker

This electric bass guitar offers exceptional sound versatility and an elegant design. Its alder body topped with a flamed maple top gives it a remarkable aesthetic and a rich and balanced sound.


Fodera basses are the reference for high-end boutique instruments in the United States; one often has to wait for months to receive the ordered instrument. This superb Monarch is therefore a great opportunity to avoid the wait. It features two Fodera/Duncan dual coil pickups, and most notably, a spectacular flamed maple top on the alder body. It comes delivered in its original case and is signed by Victor Wooten at the back of the headstock.

item.title: Used Dean EABC Acoustic/Electric Bass, Hardcase — $199
item.description:
$199 · Very Good · Uncle Ike's Music & Sound

Dean EABC Acoustic-Electric 4-String Bass Guitar

The Dean EABC is a classic acoustic-electric bass designed to provide excellent natural resonance with the added flexibility of a professional onboard preamp system. Featuring a comfortable cutaway design for easy upper-fret access and a full, warm tone, this bass is a reliable choice for acoustic sets, practice, or songwriting.

Specifications & Features

Model: EABC (Acoustic Bass Cutaway).
Body Style: Cutaway for improved playability and access.
Electronics: Integrated onboard preamp and pickup system for plug-and-play capability.
Configuration: 4-String standard tuning.
Included: Original Dean hard case.

Condition Note

The bass is in very good cosmetic and structural shape. While it exhibits some minor, standard playwear consistent with a well-cared-for instrument, there is no damage that affects its performance or playability. The neck is straight, the bridge is secure, and the electronics have been tested and function exactly as they should.

This instrument plays nicely, balances well on a strap, and includes the original hard case for secure storage. It is fully set up, sounds great acoustically or amplified, and is ready to be enjoyed.

item.title: Fodera Imperial Elite 6 Custom 2023 — $8,338.65
item.description:
$8,338.65 · Excellent · rolf's Gear Locker

This is one unbelievable instrument.


Fodera Imperial Elite six-string. Ordered by me in 2021 and received in 2023.


Amboyna burl top with matching headstock


Birdseye maple fretboard with amboyna burl block inlays


Roasted ash body


Roasted ash tone block


Birdseye maple heel plate


Three piece flame roasted maple neck (center piece is not flame) - "Thin & Fast" profile with satin finish


Seymour Duncan dual-coils with Pope 3-band preamp


Gold hardware - 17.5mm bridge spacing


Input jack on side (custom request)


35" scale


10.2 lbs


Condition:


Overall, the bass is in superb shape. It is mostly pristine except for a couple issues, the most notable of which is a small crack in the finish. It protrudes slightly from under the input jack, where it appears to have started at the screw. Yes, that sucks. But the crack is so shallow that it's hard to feel, even with a fingernail. You will also see a picture of two tiny dings on the upper side of the lower horn. The control plate cover has some pretty open grain on the edge, which looks like wear, but isn't. You can faintly make it out in the picture provided.


It will be lovingly shipped UPS in its original hard case, with paperwork, tools, and key.

item.title: Vintage Reissued LVJ74NAT Natural Left-Handed — $449
item.description:
$449 · Excellent · Las Vegas Lefty

Up for sale today is a left handed Vintage Reissued LVJ74NAT Natural. This bass is in exceptional playing condition and excellent cosmetic condition . No dings, dents, or buckle rash. This bass was never gigged, only gently used in my smoke free studio. Includes hemp gig bag and orignal chrome pickup guard and bridge cover. Screws are secured on back of each. Also includes truss rod adjusting wrench and is equipped with La Bella flat-wounds 760FS-.045-.105 standard. Bass will be securely packaged and shipped in a heavy-duty cardboard box. A great bass that will give you hours of grooving sounds!


Specification

  • Body: Alder (Natural)
  • Neck: Hard Maple – Bolt On
  • Fingerboard: Maple
  • Scale: 34″/864mm
  • Frets: 20
  • Neck Inlays: Black Block
  • Tuners: Wilkinson® WJBL200
  • Bridge: Adjustable
  • Pickups: 2 Wilkinson® (N) WOJBn (B) WOJBb
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Ashtray Cover/Pickup Guard
  • Controls: 2 Volume/ 1 Tone

Please read below and afterwards, if you have any questions or need more pictures, please let me know! All reasonable offers will be considered. Please, no offers for trade.

Sorry, no overseas sales.

If payment confirmation is received from Reverb BEFORE 4:00 p.m. PST, the item will ship same day.   If payment confirmation is received from Reverb AFTER 4:00 p.m. PST, the item will ship next day. If payment confirmation is received AFTER 4:00 p.m. PST on Friday, the item will ship the following Monday. 

Shipping & Handling:

S&H is based on location and all items are sent via Fed Ex or UPS and receipt of package requires adult signature. 

This item is sold As-Described

This item is sold As-Described and cannot be returned unless it arrives in a condition different from how it was described or photographed. Insurance is optional and at buyer’s discretion. All claims against the carrier are the buyer’s responsibility and when making a carrier claim, items must be returned in original, as-shipped condition with all original packaging.

item.title: Schecter 2500 Stiletto Extreme 4 Bass Guitar, Black Cherry — $599
item.description:
$599 · Brand New · Murphy's Music of Texas

Schecter's ultra-playable Stiletto Extreme 4 solidbody bass guitar gives you an amazing playing experience. From its gorgeous figured-maple top to its sustain-friendly mahogany body to its super-fast maple neck, the Stiletto Extreme 4 oozes attitude and tone. You'll love the pair of Schecter Diamond Bass pickups and the active electronics; this setup lets you conjure practically any kind of bass tone you want - and plenty of it. Top-grade components keep this bass in stable tune, for worry-free performance. You'll also appreciate the cool Vector inlays that grace the rosewood fingerboard. The Stiletto Extreme 4 is a class act!

item.title: Touch Guitars U8 Black - like Chapman Stick with gigbag and extras — $2,499
item.description:
$2,499 · Excellent · HSoundNoiseH Home

Up for sale is a Touch Guitars U8 8 string touch guitar optimized for touch style play or tapping. Akin to the venerable Chapman Stick but in a more traditional guitar shape and form

Not the original owner but the U8 guitar has never left my smoke-free house. Plays and sounds great! Hate to sell but I'm moving. In excellent shape!

34-inch scale. Body is swamp ash, neck and fingerboard are maple. Frets are in great shape.

The pickup is their Delano SBC Series Pickup. Tuning machines are locking, strap system is Jim Dunlop Straplock System unique for multiple playing positions (strap locks on front and back of body).

Touch Guitars original bag is thick protection with plenty of padding and pockets.

Tuning came w/ all 5ths Bb F C G D A C D (low to high), which is the default Touch Guitars tuning, but you can tune it how you want.

Two straps are included – a Slider Strap and a Levi’s strap both with straplocks and some case candy. Extra set of strings included (not pictured). Stand is not included.

This is rare opportunity to get your hands tapping on one of these fine instruments stateside for a reasonable price without having wait for a build, and then pay for expensive overseas shipping, tariffs, etc.

Sale is final with no returns! But feel free to reach out with questions before buying and I'll do my best to answer promptly.

Reasonable offers considered!

Shipping to lower 48 states USA only.

Thanks for looking!

item.title: 2023 Roscoe SKB3005 Mastergrade Quilted Maple - Loaded — $3,500
item.description:
$3,500 · Mint · Shane's Gear Outlet


Edit: I have for sale other places and can save you money if your serious message.

This bass spared nothing as I picked out the best Keith had and it’s quite phenomenal on looks, build and Playability. Message me if you want to talk directly about this bass.

Specs:

1 piece lightweight ash body

Mastergrade quilted maple

Signature Wenge-Maple-Wenge neck

Ebony fretboard

Diamond wood nut

D-Cline Designs matching wood knobs

Nordstrand 3 band preamp with VTC tone control and active passive

Roscoe custom Quad coils.

New Heavy Duty Gigbag

8.3 pounds

35 inch scale

Beat B string in the business.

item.title: 2017 Kiesel Brian Bromburg Signature 4 String Electric Bass w Carvin Deluxe Case — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Excellent · Magdon Music of Northeastern PA

Like Magdon Music on FB!
For your review and consideration- we present you with another fine Bass Guitar from the guitar collection at  Magdon Music!
Please read the description below and review the photos.  The exact bass guitar pictured and in the description is the exact guitar that you will be bidding on.  If there is something that you need to know that is not in this description- please message us at Magdon Music before bidding and we will be very happy to assist! 
*** Please note that our guitars are tech inspected before they go out the door! Buy with confidence from Magdon Music!
***Shipping is for the Continental USA (lower 48 only!)We do not ship guitars to destinations outside of the Continental USA.
🎸 Just in to Magdon Music: a used 2017 Kiesel Brian Bromburg Signature 4-String Bass - Vintage Burst Flame - With Carvin Deluxe Soft Case! 

Pictured here is a fantastic used 2017 Kiesel Brian Bromburg Signature Bass, in Great condition! When jazz musician Brian Bromburg set out to create his signature instrument, he knew no one could get it right better than Kiesel. The result is an unbelievably sleek active bass, with an ultra-playable neck and a great, full-range of tone. This Kiesel is in great condition, very clean, and aside from a small chip on the back of the headstock, this bass appears to have very little visible playwear! This eye catching bass can be yours - at our price, why not take it? Order today! 

The Brian Bromberg-designed B24 is a fusion between "old school" and "new school". The flow of the body running analogous to that of the headstock and the traditional sound provided by its radiused Radium pickups is the perfect blend of the two styles. Compared to previous designs, the upper horn is further extended to align with the 12th fret, which, according to Bromberg in a 2011 interview, "means it balances… in playing position". The bottom horn keeps the same aesthetical vibe of the bass's design, but curves along the leg to create a natural balance while seated. As a whole, the bass offers an ergonomic flow that creates maximized comfort.

♨️ Features & Specs:BodyAlderBridgeHipshot™ A-Style Bridge, .748" (19mm) SpacingHipshot™ A-Style Bridge, .748" (19mm) SpacingConstructionNeck-ThroughDimensions45.75" Long, 1.625" Thick, 13.5" Wide46" Long, 1.625" Thick, 13.75" WideElectronics18V Active/Passive Electronics, Master Volume/Push-Pull Active Passive Switch, Pickup Blend, Stacked Concentric Bass/TrebleFingerboardEbony With 14" RadiusFrets24 Medium-Jumbo Stainless Steel Frets, .103 Wide X .048 TallHardwareChromeHeadstockBromberg Signature HeadstockInlaysAbalone Brian Bromberg Signature Inlays With Standard Black-Ring Luminlay Super Blue Side DotsNeckTung-Oiled Maple With Two High-Strength Carbon-Fiber Reinforcing Rods And Fully-Adjustable Dual Action Truss RodNeck Width1.53" Wide @ Nut, 0.77" Thick @ 1st Fret, 0.88" Thick @ 12th Fret1.76" Wide @ Nut, 0.77" Thick @ 1st Fret, 0.88" Thick @ 12th Fret2.02" Wide @ Nut, 0.77" Thick @ 1st Fret, 0.88" Thick @ 12th FretPickupsKiesel Radium Radiused Single CoilsScale Length34"StringsDunlop Super BrightsTunersKiesel Premium Tuners, 20:1 RatioWeight8.8 lbs

📦 What's Included:

  • Used 2017 Kiesel Brian Bromburg Vintage Burst Flame 
  • Carvin Deluxe Soft Carrying Case 

🩺 Condition:In "Great" Condition, with minimal playwear. Small chip on headstock. Please note: This bass is currently on display in our spectacular showroom, and may experience some light demo play under the careful supervision of our attentive staff. 
This is one Bass Guitar that we REALLY love! 

***Shipping is for the continental USA ONLY! (Lower 48 only!) Magdon Music reserves the right to ship FedEx, UPS, or USPS - depending on your ship address/ship rates.
**Returns Accepted**Buyer pays two-way shipping**A restock fee may apply
(SC.108M00.SO)BrianBromby.CLVN
If there is anything else that you need to know about this Bass or if you would like an in-hand description or more photos- please feel free to message our professional guitar department at Magdon Music and we will be very happy to assist you!
Magdon Music is open Monday thru Friday 11am -7pm (est) and Saturdays from 11am - 4pm.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1964 - Aged Olympic White Refin — $11,999
item.description:
$11,999 · Excellent · The Bass Shop

Product details:

The Shop just got this absolutely killer '64 Jazz Bass from a local player who is thinning his herd. The refin was done through Mike Lull Guitarworks, then Plek'd shortly thereafter. The bass is all original with the exception of the pots and pickguard. The original pots are included, tested and working. 

WEIGHT:  9 lbs. 3 ozs.   

SERIAL #:  CZ579167

DATE:  2024 

NUT WIDTH:  1 1/2"  

RADIUS:  7.25"

COLOR:  Aged Olympic White "Journeyman Relic"

BODY/NECK/FINGERBOARD:  Alder/ Maple/ Rosewood 

PICKUPS/ELECTRONICS:  Jazz Bass/ Vol., Vol., Tone

CONDITION:  Excellent

CASE:  Fender Hardshell Case

item.title: Sire Marcus MIller V7 New Gen Electric 4 String Bass Guitar Natural Finish w/ Bag — $594.99
item.description:
$594.99 · Excellent · Magdon Music of Northeastern PA

Like Magdon Music on FB!
For your review and consideration- we present you with another fine Bass Guitar from the guitar collection at Magdon Music!
Please read the description below and review the photos. The exact bass guitar pictured and in the description is the exact guitar that you will be bidding on.  If there is something that you need to know that is not in this description- please message us at Magdon Music before bidding and we will be very happy to assist! 
*** Please note that our guitars are tech inspected before they go out the door! Buy with confidence from Magdon Music!
***Shipping is for the Continental USA (lower 48 only!)We do not ship guitars to destinations outside of the Continental USA.
🎸 Just in to Magdon Music: a used Sire Marcus Miller V7 Electric Bass - Natural Alder Finish - With Deluxe Gig Bag! 

Pictured here is an incredible used Sire Marcus Miller V7, in Excellent condition! This high-quality jazz bass is often lauded by bassists for its incredible value, with a great sounding pre-amp and incredible construction that keeps your playing smooth and sweet. This bass is in excellent condition, with minimal visible playwear. These basses are incredible value, and ours comes with a case!! Order Today! 

Building on the success of its second-generation predecessor, the Marcus Miller V7 New Gen bass guitar fuses the best of heritage design with a revised neck profile, optimized instrument balance, updated electronics, and new tonewood and finish options — all built with Sire’s unwavering commitment to quality craftsmanship. As Sire’s flagship bass model, the V7 is the benchmark for faithfully reproducing Marcus Miller’s instantly identifiable, yet genre-transcending sound, and studio bassists enthusiastically agree that this advanced instrument downright nails it. From the premium tonewoods and acclaimed Edgeless rolled-edge fingerboard to the Marcus Miller Heritage-3 preamp system and revoiced Marcus Miller Super-J Revolution pickups, the V7 New Gen gives bass players the cutting edge in style, ergonomics, playability, and tonal versatility.

♨️ Features & Specs:

  • Advanced-design solidbody electric bass guitar
  • Available in 4- and 5-string, fretted and fretless models
  • Comfort-contoured North American alder body
  • Hard maple bolt-on neck with New Gen C profile and Luminlay side markers
  • Ebony, maple, or roasted maple Edgeless fingerboard, depending on finish
  • Stainless steel frets on fretted models
  • 2 Marcus Miller Super-J Revolution New Gen pickups
  • Heritage-3 active/passive preamp with 3-band EQ
  • Marcus Miller Modern-S bass bridge; bone nut
  • Premium lightweight open-gear tuners


  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed: Right-handed
  • Body Type: Solidbody
  • Body Shape: Marcus Miller V7 Vintage
  • Body Material: North American Alder
  • Color: Natural
  • Neck Material: Hard Maple
  • Neck Shape: C
  • Neck Joint: Bolt-on
  • Radius:9.5"
  • Fingerboard Material: Hard Maple
  • Fingerboard Inlay: Blocks
  • Number of Frets:20
  • Fret Type: Medium
  • Fret Material: Stainless Steel
  • Scale Length:34"
  • Scale Length Type: Standard-scale
  • Nut Material: Bone
  • Bridge/ Tailpiece: Marcus Miller Vintage-S
  • Hardware Finish: Chrome
  • Tuners: Premium Open Gear
  • Neck Pickup: Marcus Vintage J-style Revolution Single-coil
  • Bridge Pickup: Marcus Vintage J-style Revolution Single-coil
  • Controls:1 x stacked volume/tone, 1 x blend, 3-band Active EQ, 2-way mini active/passive toggle

📦 What's Included:

  • Sire Marcus Miller V7 4 String Electric Bass Guitar 
  • Deluxe Soft Carrying Case 

🩺 Condition: In Excellent condition! Minimal visible playwear. Please note: This bass is currently on display in our spectacular showroom, and may experience some light demo play under the careful supervision of our attentive staff. 


This is one Bass Guitar that we REALLY love!

 
***Shipping is for the continental USA ONLY! (Lower 48 only!) Magdon Music reserves the right to ship FedEx, UPS, or USPS - depending on your ship address/ship rates.**Returns Accepted**Buyer pays two-way shipping**A restock fee may apply


(SC.38M50.SO)MMV7.CLVN


If there is anything else that you need to know about this Bass or if you would like an in-hand description or more photos- please feel free to message our professional guitar department at Magdon Music and we will be very happy to assist you!


Magdon Music is open Monday thru Friday 11am -7pm (est) and Saturdays from 11am - 4pm.

item.title: Ibanez SR1300E - Natural Flat satin finish — $800
item.description:
$800 · Excellent · Private individual

Ibanez Premium SR1300E - Natural Flat satin finish, in great condition. Built in 2018.

Mahogany Body with Ash & Walnut top, 5-piece Panga Panga/Purpleheart neck, Nordstrand Big Single pickups, 3-band Active EQ, GraphTech Tusq nut, Gotoh tuners, Monorail bridge. Weighs 7.2 lbs on my digital bathroom scale. Has a big, punchy, aggressive sound with plenty of tonal variety. Fast, slender, oil finished neck makes it a breeze to play. Currently strung with DR Dragon Skin round wounds.

These basses are crafted in Ibanez’s Premium factory, located in Indonesia, and benefit from high-precision machining and meticulous hand-finishing. Unlike mass-produced guitars, the production of the Premium models is overseen by skilled Indonesian luthiers, collaborating with Japanese counterparts for total control over quality.

Comes with a nice Gator Transit gig bag ($135.00 value).

item.title: Peavey Foundation 5-String Bass White Maple Neck w/Hardshell Case - Used — $499
item.description:
$499 · Very Good · Mill River Music & Guitar Shop

Peavey Foundation 5-String Bass White Maple Neck w/Hardshell Case - Used
Peavey built the Foundation in Meridian, Mississippi, and these basses have earned a quiet but consistent reputation among players who actually own one: genuinely great necks, solid construction, and a tone that punches well above the price tag they originally carried. The poplar body with a deep double cutaway gives unimpeded access to the upper frets, and the two single-coil high-output Peavey pickups deliver a full, present voice with real low-end authority — a P-Bass-on-steroids quality that players consistently call out as a defining characteristic of this model. The five-bolt maple neck is the detail players love most, and it shows here: fast, comfortable, and built for serious playing.
A sleek powerhouse, exactly as described. This is a working bass built by people who knew what they were doing, and it has aged into a genuinely respected sleeper in the used market.
Condition is Very Good with only very minor signs of use. Check the photos for specifics. Comes with a hardshell case.
- Make: Peavey
- Model: Foundation 5-String
- Serial number: 10083554
- Country of origin: USA (Meridian, Mississippi)
- Body: Poplar, double cutaway, white finish
- Neck: Maple, 5-bolt
- Fingerboard: Maple
- Scale length: 34"
- Nut width: 1.8"
- Frets: 21
- Pickups: 2x Peavey single-coil, high output
- Controls: Volume 1, volume 2, master tone
- Bridge: Heavily plated die-cast, top-loaded, barrel-style saddles
- Hardware: Heavily plated die-cast
- Weight: 9 lbs 7 oz
- Modifications: None confirmed
- Includes: Hardshell case
Ships carefully packed and insured for full value.
International buyers are welcome — please contact us for a shipping quote before purchasing.
About Mill River Music
Mill River Music is an independent, human-powered music shop located in downtown Northampton, MA, run by a team of players, enthusiasts, and certified repair technicians. Every piece of used gear we sell is personally inspected, tested, and set up before it ships — we don't list it until we'd be happy to play it ourselves.
As Martin and Taylor certified techs, we hold our guitar work to a high standard, and we're committed to full transparency about the condition of everything we sell. No surprises.
When you buy from Mill River, you're supporting an independent local business that genuinely cares — about gear, about players, and about doing things right. We're here every step of the way. Reach out anytime.

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller V7 4-String Electric Bass Guitar — $550
item.description:
$550 · Excellent · GravityMusicGear

  • Make/Model: Sire Marcus Miller V7
  • Serial Number: 2N25342966
  • Location of Manufacture: Indonesia
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Nut Width: 1 1/2"
  • Weight: 8.6lbs
  • Finish Color: Blue
  • Pickup/Control Layout: Sire Marcus Miller Single Coil Pickups, Active Electronics; Volume w/ Passive Tone inner Ring, Blend, treble, Mid Boost w/ Mid-Frequency inner ring, Bass boost
  • Neck Wood: Maple
  • Fingerboard Wood: Maple
  • Case: Does not Include Case, but will be Professionally Packed and Shipped
  • Features: 20 Frets, Block Inlays, Chrome Hardware w/ Open-Gear Tuning Machines
  • Condition: This is a fantastic bass! The body and headstock are in great shape with no notable fretwear. The neck is straight and smooth with no notable cosmetic wear. The fretboard is clean and the frets are polished; the frets themselves show light play marks, but are free of any notable fretwear. This is a great bass that plays like butter, but because this is a preowned instrument there may be a blemish I failed to notice, so please inspect photos carefully before purchase. All electronics have been tested and are in working condition. Everything which is included is pictured and is ready to be professionally packed and shipped.

06252026-12 KADK

item.title: Vlcek Fineso 2023 Figured Maple — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · Lame Gear

This bass is beautiful looking and sounding. It’s been set up by a local luthier with a set of DR High Beams, 30-130, and man does it sing.

Built in 2022-23, it features a neck thru build, massive custom single coil pickups and a custom 2-band preamp, with volume, volume, tone, bass, treble knobs and an active/passive switch. Check out his website, Miroslav makes some of the finest boutique basses in Europe.

Listing it as excellent condition. Imperfections are minor and are specifically pointed out in the photos. I really hate to let this one go, but it has the same sound and serves the same function as my workhorse 6-string. Unfortunately, I can’t find a way to justify keeping it.

Comes with Gator case.

Top: Figured maple
Tone block: Ash
Body: African Mahogany
Neck: Hard maple
Fretboard: Jatoba

34” scale

24 frets

19mm spacing

Approx. 8.8 lbs

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass Control Plates (4-Hole) — $22.99
item.description:
$22.99 · Brand New · Brook Mays Music

Fender Jazz Bass Control Plates (4-Hole). Condition: New. Ships from Brook Mays Music.

item.title: Fender Jazz 1997 - Black — $1,495
item.description:
$1,495 · Very Good · Gregory's Shop

Amazing shape for a 90's bass that wasn't gigged. Upgraded Seymour Pups. Hard case included.

item.title: Westone Thunder 1 A Lefthand Lefthanded bass made in Japan active 18 volt ULTRA RARE Lefty model — $1,191.24
item.description:
$1,191.24 · Good · -=-=-v-a-m-o-s-i-a-=-=-

lethanded !!!! Ultra rare lefty version.. Thunder Bass 1 A made in Japan, this is the more luxury active version with internal 18 volt preamp, killer sound with lots of headroom and power,, nice brass bridge . It also works pasive so you can also play it without batteries… there are some normal sings of use for the age , a few dings in the laquer , frets are great ! NO fretwear ! Great bass form the golden age of Japanese manufacturing

item.title: Sterling StingRay Ray34 with Roasted Maple Neck 2018 - Present - Black with John East preamp and Nordratrand pickup — $800
item.description:
$800 · Excellent · Neal's Gear Depot

This listing is for a 2025 Sterling Ray34. It has been upgraded with a John East MMSR preamp that retails for $310. Also upgraded with a Nordratrand MM4.2 Dual Coil pickup that retails for $139. It is in excellent condition and has only been played at home. This bass plays beautifully and sounds killer.

item.title: Jolana Diamant bass 1979 — $396.09
item.description:
$396.09 · Very Good · Vintage guitars

Vintage guitar in very good condition. No restorations have been performed. Complete set, as purchased. Electronics work well in all modes. Little use, as evidenced by the condition of the neck. Stored in the original semi-hard case. There are minor signs of wear on the lacquer finish. Suitable for both collection and playing. Delivery will be disassembled for safety reasons, without a case. Delivery with a case is possible for an additional €25. Please ask all questions before payment. No returns, sorry.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Late '60s Limited-Edition Jazz Bass - Lake Placid Blue — $415
item.description:
$415 · Excellent · Sound Harbor Music

A tribute to the decade of its birth, the Classic Vibe Late ‘60s Jazz Bass® combines the luxurious playability that made it famous with the versatility and massive tone of its dual Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickups. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable “C”-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5”-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a vintage-style bridge with threaded saddles. This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

FEATURES:

Solid Poplar Jazz Bass Body 
Gloss Lake Placid Blue Finish
Fender Designed Alnico Single Coil Jazz Bass Pickups
4-Saddle Vintage-Style Bridge w/ Steel Saddles 
Nickel Hardware 
Vintage-Style Tuning Machines 
3-Ply Parchment Pickguard 
Black Plastic Control Knobs 
Maple Neck
Aged White Neck Binding 
Tinted Gloss Neck Finish
C-Shape Neck Profile 
34" Scale Length
Indian Laurel Fretboard 
9.5" Fretboard Radius 
20 Narrow Tall Frets 
Bone Nut 
1.5" Nut Width
Pearloid Block Inlays

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Active '70s Jazz Bass - Guitar Ocean Turquoise — $485
item.description:
$485 · Excellent · Sound Harbor Music

The Squier Classic Vibe Active '70s Jazz Bass guitar takes the unmistakable vintage flair of its namesake era and supercharges it with modern tonal versatility. Dressed in a gloss finish and adorned with classic block inlays and binding, this J Bass exudes throwback attitude. Under the hood, however, it's all about performance—thanks to a pair of Fender-designed alnico Noiseless pickups and an active/passive preamp system. From punchy fingerstyle grooves to boosted slap tones and warm, laid-back passive settings, this bass delivers pro-level control for players who want more than just vintage looks. Whether you're gigging, recording or crafting your tone, the Classic Vibe Active '70s Jazz Bass gives you the tools to shape your sound with precision and style.

Fender-Designed Noiseless Pickups Provide Clean, Powerful Tone

At the heart of this instrument are two Fender-designed alnico Noiseless single-coil pickups that deliver classic Jazz Bass clarity and bite—minus the 60-cycle hum. With responsive attack and smooth low-end detail, these pickups offer a dynamic, articulate voice that excels in funk, jazz, rock and more. Whether you're laying down tight pocket grooves or taking center stage with melodic bass lines, the Noiseless design ensures your tone stays pure and defined in any mix.

Onboard Preamp Expands Tonal Possibilities

The Classic Vibe Active '70s Jazz Bass features an onboard 9V preamp that unlocks a wide palette of sonic options. Dial in your ideal tone using the dedicated volume, tone, blend and stacked treble/bass boost controls, or switch over to passive mode with a flick of the mini toggle for a more traditional sound. This flexible setup lets you move seamlessly from studio to stage and from subtle warmth to modern punch without ever changing instruments.

HiMass Bridge Adds Resonance and Sustain

The inclusion of a HiMass bridge is more than just a visual upgrade—it significantly enhances sustain and note definition. The increased mass at the point of string contact improves vibration transfer to the body, resulting in bolder lows and longer-lasting notes. Its adjustable saddles allow for precise intonation settings, ensuring your playing is always in tune. Coupled with vintage-Body wood: Poplar

  • Body finish: Gloss polyurethane
  • Color: Mocha, Ocean Turqouise

Neck

  • Neck wood: Maple
  • Neck finish: Tinted gloss urethane
  • Scale length: 34"
  • Fingerboard wood: Maple
  • Number of frets: 20
  • Inlays: Pearloid block
  • Truss rod: Head adjust

Hardware

  • Bridge: HiMass
  • Nut material: Bone
  • Nut width: 1.5"
  • Tuning machines: Vintage-style
  • Hardware finish: Nickel

Electronics

  • Pickup configuration: SS
  • Bridge: Fender-designed alnico Noiseless single-coil
  • Neck: Fender-designed alnico Noiseless single-coil
  • Controls: Master volume, master tone, blend, treble/bass boost
  • Switching: 2-position mini toggle active/passive switch open-gear tuners and a bone nut, the hardware setup on this J Bass ensures rock-solid tuning stability and a tone that rings out with authority.

item.title: 2005 Rickenbacker 4003 4-String Electronic Bass Guitar, JetGlo w/ Case - Previously Owned — $1,899.99
item.description:
$1,899.99 · Good · Bill's Music

Previously Owned 2005 Rickenbacker 4003 4-String Electronic Bass Guitar, JetGlo

This bass is in good, players condition with many dings & scratches. Missing the bridge pickup cover. PLEASE NOTE: The bridge pickup pole pieces are not perfectly aligned underneath each string. Also, the pickguard is cracked. This bass is professionally set-up and ready to rock!

Includes original hardshell case. The case has wear & tear. 1 of 2 case lid straps needs to be re-attached.

This bass weighs 9 pounds, 8.2 ounces.

Serial #: 0504820. Made in the USA.

item.description:

Case not included.

Serial #: N004162. Made in the USA.

Squier 2021 Affinity Series Precision Bass PJ Electric Bass Guitar Sunburst. Made in Indonesia.

Excellent condition. Hardly played. Small scratch on the back of the headstock.(pictured)

item.title: Ibanez SRH500F-NNF Bass Workshop Fretless Soundgear 2017 - Present - Natural Browned Burst Flat — $550
item.description:
$550 · Excellent · Clay 's Gear Outlet

Never gets played hoping someone else can do this beauty justice. Comes with gator gig bag.

item.title: Ibanez BTB745 NTL - Low Gloss Natural — $799
item.description:
$799 · Excellent · Discount Music Center

Evolving and perfecting, the Ibanez BTB series has always aimed at expanding the player’s full range of creative expression. The elegant, curving, massive body of select tone woods and dedicated equipment provide huge tones. Neck-through construction with a 35-in scale, a two-octave fretboard and a super-deep cutaway promise sleek playability and rich sustain. The BTB series defines what the “Boutique Bass” is all about.

The Ash wing body with a Walnut top/Mahogany back brings a superior sound attack and a firm low end. The 35-in. scale 5pc Wenge/Bubinga/Maple through-neck provide a tight low end and massive sustain. The Jatoba fretboard has Stainless Steel frets for bright tone, and with high durability. It also has a zero fret for accurate intonation and minimal string action—opening the string sound to be the same as other frets.

Electronics include Bartolini BH2 pickups for tight bottom end, a full mid range with a smooth response. Combined with the Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ w/3-way Mid frequency switch, the BTB745 allows tonal variation which covers from simple chord work to complex soloing. The Mono-rail V allows for a wider intonation adjustment range and each isolated bridge is securely locked down to the body for maximum vibration transfer without interference. D'Addario NYXL strings are installed to expand the dynamic range and harmonic response. It also includes a high-tech Neutrik locking output jack for stable and secure connections, preventing accidental disconnect or shock and vibration.

  • Wood: Wenge/bubinga/maple
  • Neck joint: Neck-through
  • Scale length: 35 in.
  • Truss rod: Standard
  • Finish: Satin

Pickups

  • Active or passive pickups: Passive
  • Pickup configuration: SS
  • Neck: BH2
  • Middle: Not applicable
  • Bridge: BH2
  • Brand: Bartolini
  • Series or parallel: Info not available
  • Active preamp: Not applicable
  • Special electronics: Info not available

Fretboard

  • Material: Jatoba
  • Radius: Info not available
  • Fret size: Medium
  • Number of frets: 24
  • Inlays: Oval
  • Nut material: Info not available
  • Nut width: Info not available
  • Neck width at 12 fret: Info not available

Body

  • Cutaway: Double cutaway
  • Construction: Semi-hollowbody
  • Body wood: Ash/mahogany
  • Top wood: Walnut
  • Body finish: Satin
  • Orientation: Right handed

Controls

  • Control layout: Volume 1, volume 2, 3-band EQ
  • Pickup switch: No
  • Coil tap or split: No
  • Tone switching: No
  • Special switching: Yes

item.title: RKM DS5 JMM 2025 - Baby Blue Metallic — $2,200
item.description:
$2,200 · Excellent · Gear Emporium

Beautiful RKM handmade in Mexico. I have LaBella Gold Tapes on here. I have owned many high end basses, and this one is right there. I'd compare the craftsmanship and neck feel with USA Lakland. The neck is amazing. Great B string. There is an in-depth video review of this one from Empire Music on YouTube, so you can hear the wide range of tones this bass has to offer. Comes with unopened case candy and a really nice gig bag. These are $3k now. Thinning the herd, so Im offering a very fair price.

Specifications:

  • Serial #: DS00009
  • Body Material: Solid Mahogany
  • Body Finish: Polyurethane
  • Shape: RKM Modern PB
  • Neck Material: Hard Rock Maple
  • Neck Finish: Satin Polyurethane
  • Neck Shape: RKM 5S Medium Profile
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • Reinforcement: Carbon Fiber
  • Fingerboard Material: Chechen
  • Fingerboard Radius: 12"
  • Number of Frets: 22
  • Weight: 9lbs 15oz
  • Fretwire: Vintage Narrow
  • Nut Material: Bone Unbleached
  • Nut Width: 1.75"
  • Position Markers: Luminlay Side Dots
  • Bridge Pickup: EMG MM5CS Active
  • Neck Pickup: EMG J5 Active
  • Preamp: EMG BTS System 9V
  • Controls: Volume, Blend, Bass, Treble
  • Bridge: Leo Quan Badass V
  • Tuning Machine: Leo Quan Badass OGT Mini Bass Keys
  • Knobs: Metallic
  • Neck Plate: 4 Bolts w/ Ferrules
  • Strings: La Bella RX-N5B 45-125 Nickel Round Wound
  • Case: Mono M80 Sleeve, Black

item.title: Fender Justin Meldal-Johnsen Road Worn Signature Mustang Bass 2019 - Present - Black — $1,199.99
item.description:
$1,199.99 · Excellent · Eric Dills

Purchased used, in excellent condition, in 2023. I used it for a couple hours on a home recording project, and it’s been hanging on my wall looking beautiful ever since. It’s never left my house. It’s as awesome as advertised, and plays fantastic. I’m selling basically because it deserves a better home than just hanging on my wall. Includes new gig bag.
